description.default: From full website builds to small fixes, I help businesses create fast, clean, professional, and easy-to-manage WordPress websites.

default.title: Custom WordPress Website Design
default.text: Complete business websites designed and built from scratch, clean, modern, and easy for you to manage.

default.title: Elementor & Elementor Pro Development
default.text: Pixel-perfect, responsive Elementor builds with clean structure, global styles, and reusable templates.

default.title: WooCommerce Store Development
default.text: Product pages, cart, checkout, payment gateways, and store layouts that feel smooth and trustworthy.

default.title: WordPress Bug Fixing
default.text: Theme, plugin, Elementor, WooCommerce, responsive, and layout issues debugged carefully.

default.title: WordPress Speed Optimization
default.text: Core Web Vitals improvements, image optimization, cache setup, script cleanup, and performance fixes.

default.title: Figma to WordPress
default.text: Responsive builds from Figma designs using Elementor, custom themes, or clean frontend development.

default.title: Landing Page Design
default.text: Focused pages for services, products, ads, and lead generation with clear CTAs.

default.title: Maintenance & Security
default.text: Updates, backups, malware cleanup, monitoring, and dependable ongoing care.

default.title: ACF, CPT & Custom Theme Development
default.text: Custom post types, flexible fields, and lightweight custom themes built with clean PHP.

default.title: API Integration & Automation
default.text: CRMs, payment gateways, webhooks, and workflow automation connected to your WordPress site.

default.title: AI Workflow Automation
default.text: AI chatbots, lead qualification, content workflows, CRM handoffs, and smart automations connected to your WordPress website.
